緩破試驗：於測試樣品中心位置註入氣體，施予測試樣品平均爆破壓力的8成
壓力為測試壓力，測試完成後，以目視檢驗無菌屏障系統是否出現破損。
Creep test: Apply 80% of the average burst pressure as the test pressure into the
center of the test article. After the test, visually inspect whether the damage is present
10.2.2.4 產品無菌試驗：參照 ISO11737-2[11]進行試驗，檢查無菌屏障繫統內的 EO滅
菌製程挑戰產品(PE79052068)是否維持無菌。
Product sterilitytest: Perform thetest inaccordance withISO11737-2[11],and
confirm whether the EO sterilization PCD assembly, XPE with metal (PE79052068)
within the sterile barrier system remains sterile.
代表性無菌屏障系統經8年加速老化後，其包材測試結果皆符合允收標準，如表5。
The packaging test results of master sterile barrier system after 8 years accelerated aging have met the
acceptance criteria, as shown in Table 5.
結果顯示每一單邊每次密封強度皆大於160N/m。
